film.title: The Wiz
film.overview: Dorothy Gale, a shy kindergarten teacher, is swept away to the magic land of Oz where she embarks on a quest to return home.

King of the jungle?  King of the cowards.  You oughta be ashamed of yourself, scaring us like that.  You big scaredy-cat!  I can't scare anything. I can't even scare a-a-a scarecrow...
♪ Ease on down the road Ease on down the road. ♪  Ahh,..  Mamá would be so proud.  Going to see the Wiz!  My mamá used to always say to me,..
